name: Plaid Outdoor Knife Edge Lumbar Throw Pillow Beige/White
description:
Add a little character with the fun, casual checkered pattern of this deep seating pillow and cushion set. It features country cottage style beige gingham fabric that adds texture and dimension to any decor. Corded trim is a polished finishing touch.

Length 13 inches
Width 20 inches
Height 6 inches
Weight 1.1 pounds If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.
